ru-RU.AUTO_PIVOT_DESC:
Automatically adjusts the pivot to match the text alignment.
When the editor is in Simple mode, this is always enabled regardless of settings
ru-RU.AUTO_UPDATE_BETA_DESC:
<color=#ff0000>Not recommended.</color>
Use this only if you are willing to risk <color=#ff0000>file corruption</color>
or <color=#ff0000>malfunction</color> in order to access the beta version fast
ru-RU.CAPLINE_GEO_ALIGNED: Выровненный по Геометрии Линии Заглавных Букв
ru-RU.ERROR_THIS_OBJECT_INDEX: Unable to load object data at index {0}
ru-RU.FILE_ATTEMPT_DESC:
Enables FileAttempts & FileTileAttempts tags.
When enabled, an Overlayer_Attempts.json file will always be created in the current map folder.
Disable this if you do not want files to be generated
ru-RU.INCLUDE_REFERENCES_DESC:
When this setting is enabled,
elements that rely on external files
(such as fonts and images)
will be included directly in the JSON file export.

This may increase the file size
ru-RU.LEGACY_THEME_DESC: Reverts Overlayer’s custom clean theme back to Unity’s default OnGUI theme
ru-RU.MISC_DEVELOPER: modlist.org. Display everything as you wish. Thank you for being with Overlayer.
ru-RU.NAME: Имя
ru-RU.SAFE_COMMAND_PARSE_DESC:
Parses commands safely by catching errors.
Returns a default value instead of throwing exceptions on failure.

May hide underlying errors
ru-RU.SHOW_TRUE_AUTO_JUDGEMENT_DESC:
Patches the in game judgement line code
so that judgements are always displayed on the Hit Error Meter even during Autoplay
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ABSMAXXACCURACY: The highest achievable Absolute Max XAccuracy in the current tile(Excluding checkpoints)
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ACTUALPROGRESS: Current Actual Progress based on time
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ARTISTRAW: Composer of the song (with rich tags)
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ATTEMPTS:
Shows Attempts.
Only works on CLS and official levels.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_COLORRANGE: You can adjust the color from any color to any color you want based on a specific tag. Use with <color>.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_CPUUSAGE:
Shows the current CPU usage percentage of the ADOFAI process.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_CT: Current Too Early + Current Too Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_CV: Current Very Early + Current Very Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_DEATHS: The total number of planet explosions on the current map
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_DEFAULTTEXTCOLOR: Default text color of the level
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_DEFAULTTEXTSHADOWCOLOR: Default text shadow color of the level
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_DIFFICULTYRAW: Fixed difficulty return value regardless of language setting
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_EASEDVALUE: When the target tag value changes, the tag value changes according to the speed.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_EDITORPITCH: Pitch set in the LevelEditor (displayed as 1 when 100%)
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_EXPRESSION:
Parses a JavaScript expression and outputs the result.
This is one of the most important tags for customization, allowing arithmetic, comparisons, and most basic JS operations on tag values.
Due to the tag parsing structure, variables are not supported; only simple constructs like the ternary operator are recommended.
To access tag values, they must be called as functions (e.g., Tag()).
For complex logic, using a separate scripting file is recommended.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_FILEATTEMPTS:
Current attempt count.
Requires File Attempt setting to be enabled.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_FILETILEATTEMPTS:
Current attempt count for the start tile.
Requires File Attempt setting to be enabled.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_FRAMETIME: Time difference between the previous frame and the current frame in ms
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GCMEMALLOCRATE: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in MB per tick
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GCMEMALLOCRATEGB: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in GB per tick
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GCMEMALLOCRATEKB: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in KB per tick
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GCMEMUSAGE: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in MB
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GCMEMUSAGEGB: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in GB
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GCMEMUSAGEKB: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in KB
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUMEMORY:
Shows the total GPU memory (VRAM) available on the system in MB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUMEMORYGBYTES:
Shows the total GPU memory (VRAM) available on the system in GB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUMEMORYUSAGE:
Shows the total GPU memory (VRAM) usage on the system in MB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUMEMORYUSAGEGBYTES:
Shows the total GPU memory (VRAM) usage on the system in GB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUSHAREDMEMORY:
Shows the total shared GPU memory (VRAM) available on the system in MB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUSHAREDMEMORYGBYTES:
Shows the total shared GPU memory (VRAM) available on the system in GB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUSHAREDMEMORYUSAGE:
Shows the total shared GPU memory (VRAM) usage on the system in MB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUSHAREDMEMORYUSAGEGBYTES:
Shows the total shared GPU memory (VRAM) usage on the system in GB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_GPUUSAGE:
Shows the current GPU usage as a percentage of total GPU capacity.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ISAUTOENABLED: Displays true if auto is enabled, false otherwise
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ISAUTOTILE: Displays true if the current tile is an autotile, false otherwise
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ISNOFAILENABLED: Displays true if No-fail Mode is enabled, false if disabled
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ISOLDAUTOENABLED: Displays true if Old Auto is enabled, false if disabled
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ISPRACTICEMODEENABLED: Displays true if practice mode is enabled, false otherwise
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ISSPEEDTRIALENABLED:
Displays true if Speed Trial Mode is enabled, false otherwise.
Only works on CLS and official levels.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ISSTARTED: Displays false if not started, or true if started by pressing any key
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_LELP: Lenient Early Perfect + Lenient Late Perfect
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_LEVELNAMETEXT: The name text displayed at the top of the level.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_LEVELNAMETEXTCOLOR: The color of the text displayed at the top of the level.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_LEVELNAMETEXTRAW: The name text displayed at the top of the level. (with rich tags)
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_LEVELNAMETEXTSHADOWCOLOR: The shadow color of the text displayed at the top of the level.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_LT: Lenient Too Early + Lenient Too Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_LV: Lenient Very Early + Lenient Very Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MARGINCOMBO:
Displays the combo for a single judgment
(ex: {MarginCombo:VeryLate})
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MARGINCOMBOS:
Displays all combos for multiple judgments
(ex: {MarginCombos:VeryLate|VeryEarly})
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MARGINMAXCOMBO:
Displays the maximum combo for a single judgment
(ex: {MarginMaxCombo:VeryLate})
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MARGINMAXCOMBOS:
Displays all maximum combos for multiple judgments
(ex: {MarginMaxCombos:VeryLate|VeryEarly})
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MAXACCURACY: The highest achievable Accuracy in the current tile
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MAXTILEBPM: The highest BPM in the level
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MAXXACCURACY: The highest achievable XAccuracy in the current tile
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MEMORY:
Shows the total physical memory (RAM) available on the system in MB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MEMORYGBYTES:
Shows the total physical memory (RAM) available on the system in GB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MEMORYUSAGE:
Shows the current memory usage of the ADOFAI process in MB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MEMORYUSAGEGBYTES:
Shows the current memory usage of the ADOFAI process in GB
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MOVINGMAN: You can animate text on criterion certain tags. Used with <size>.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MULTIPRESSCOUNTER: The percentage of the multipress gauge.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_MULTIPRESSCOUNTERRAW: The raw internal value of the multipress gauge in the game.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_NELP: Normal Early Perfect + Normal Late Perfect
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_NT: Normal Too Early + Normal Too Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_NV: Normal Very Early + Normal Very Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_OELP: Official Early Perfect + Official Late Perfect
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_OT: Official Too Early + Official Too Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_OV: Official Very Early + Official Very Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_OVERLOADCOUNTER: The percentage of the overload gauge.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_OVERLOADCOUNTERRAW: The raw internal value of the overload gauge in the game.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_PITCH: Speed set in CLS (displayed as 1 when at 1x speed)
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_PROCESSORCOUNT:
Shows the number of CPU processors available on the system
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_SELP: Strict Early Perfect + Strict Late Perfect
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_SPECIALPLAYMARK:
Displays a special mark based on your play performance:
PP = perfect  FC+ = no miss
FC = full combo  XX = no special mark
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_ST: Strict Too Early + Strict Too Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_SV: Strict Very Early + Strict Very Late
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_TILEANGLE: The angle of the current tile
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_TILEENTRYANGLE: Indicates the entry angle from the entry tile to the current tile.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_TILEEXITANGLE: Indicates the exit angle from the current tile to the next tile.
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_TIMING: Error range showing the timing of keystrokes in ms from the center of the tile
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_TITLERAW: Title of the song (with rich tags)
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_TOTALCPUUSAGE:
Average CPU usage per core of the process.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_TOTALMEMORYUSAGE:
Shows the total memory usage of the system in MB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_TOTALMEMORYUSAGEGBYTES:
Shows the total memory usage of the system in GB.
Only Windows Available
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_UNITYMEMUSAGE: Shows the total memory used by Unity, not including the entire process memory
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_UNITYMEMUSAGEGB: Shows the total memory used by Unity in GB, not including the entire process memory
ru-RU.TAG_DESC_UNITYMEMUSAGEKB: Shows the total memory used by Unity in KB, not including the entire process memory
ru-RU.UPDATER_INFO_JSON_NOT_FOUND: info.json not found in the update package
ru-RU.UPDATER_SAME_VERSION_DETECTED: Update package version matches the current version
ru-RU.UPDATER_VERSION_CHECK_ERROR: Version parse or asset fetch failed
ru-RU.UPDATE_RATE_LIMITED: Update or Version check Rate Limited!
